daytime: The street is bright under a clear sky.
Sunlight shines directly on the road.
Light clouds drift above the quiet street.
The road is dry and sunlit.
Warm air surrounds the empty street.
night: The road is dark under a moonlit sky.
Streetlights glow along the quiet street.
The sky is clear and the road feels still.
A few stars hang over the empty road.
The street is dim under a cloudy night sky.
sunset: The road glows orange in the setting sun.
Fading light spreads across the street.
The sky turns red above the road.
The street is bathed in warm dusk light.
Evening light touches the quiet road.
rain: Rain falls gently on the street.
The road is wet and reflective.
Heavy rain blurs the view down the street.
A dark sky hangs over the rainy street.
fog: Fog covers the street in a pale haze.
The road fades into thick fog.
Mist hangs low over the quiet street.
The street is barely visible in the fog.
The road disappears into the mist.
snow: Snow covers the road in white.
Flakes fall softly on the street.
The snowy road looks calm and still.
Tracks mark the fresh snow on the street.
Snow drifts slowly over the road.
cloudy: The street is dim under gray clouds.
The sky is overcast above the road.
No sunlight reaches the quiet street.
The road feels cool under the clouds.
Thick clouds hang above the street.
